positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial journey. The central subject is a stylized crescent moon surrounded by abstract constellations and blooming cosmic florals. The composition should feature clean, sharp silhouettes against a deep, midnight indigo background. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of gold foil, soft lavender, and ethereal turquoise. The overall style is neo-geometric and elegant, perfect for repeating print texture on clothing. Emphasize radial symmetry and strong, clean lines. Cinematic lighting, high detail, vector art aesthetic, centered composition, perfect for screen printing.
